description: Observability and Debuggability: Detect loss of critical logs, traces, and correlation context.

fixtures.notes: Removes the logger.error() call that was on the exception handling path, making failures invisible in production.
Removes correlationId from the structured log entry on the payment flow, breaking distributed trace correlation.
Adds additional console.log calls to an existing function — observability is improved not degraded.
Keeps all existing log statements and adds a new debug log for a new code path — no loss of observability.
Reduces log verbosity by removing a noisy debug log but all error and warn level logs remain intact.
